channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [INFY*] Infosys Expands Mohali Development Center with a 350,000-sq. ft. Integrated Campus
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Infosys, a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting, announced the expansion of its Mohali Development Center (DC) with a new integrated development campus in Mohali, Punjab. The expansion, which includes a Software Development Block and supporting facilities, will seat about 3,000 employees and strengthen Infosys’ ability to design, co-create, and deploy AI-led solutions at enterprise scale. The new campus is expected to enhance Infosys’ capabilities in cloud, AI, application development, and digital transformation, enabling the company to better meet the growing demands of its global clients.

  • High-efficiency building with naturally daylit interiors and intelligent LED-based lighting
  • Advanced radiant cooling and heating supported by zone-based HVAC controls
  • Comprehensive water-saving and 100% wastewater recycling system using Membrane Bioreactor technology
  • Extensive green landscaping to reduce heat-island effects and eco-friendly construction materials
  • Smart building technologies for continuous monitoring and performance optimization

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INFOSYS LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [WMINIMT] Western Ministil Ltd Acquires 100% Shares of Micron Calcite Private Limited for ₹4.54 Crore
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Western Ministil Ltd has announced the acquisition of 100% equity shares of Micron Calcite Private Limited at a price of ₹454 per share, as per the valuation report. The total consideration for the acquisition is ₹4.54 crore, which will be paid in cash. Upon completion of the acquisition, Micron Calcite Private Limited will become a Wholly Owned Subsidiary of Western Ministil Limited. The acquisition is expected to facilitate the further expansion of Western Ministil Limited's business.

  • Acquisition of 100% equity shares of Micron Calcite Private Limited by Western Ministil Ltd
  • Total consideration of ₹4.54 crore
  • Payment to be made in cash
  • Micron Calcite Private Limited to become a Wholly Owned Subsidiary of Western Ministil Limited
  • Expected to facilitate the further expansion of Western Ministil Limited's business

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WESTERN MINISTIL LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [NUVOCO] Trading Volume Surge in Nuvoco Vistas Corporation Ltd Shares Market Driven, No Pending Price Sensitive Information
item.description:
Nuvoco Vistas Corporation Ltd clarified a significant increase in its trading volume on March 11, 2026, stating that it was market driven. The company confirmed all information was in the public domain and there was no pending price sensitive information to be disclosed under Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Nuvoco Vistas Corporation Ltd will continue to comply with its disclosure obligations as required.

  • Significant increase in Nuvoco Vistas Corporation Ltd trading volume on March 11, 2026 was market driven.
  • No pending price sensitive information as per Regulation 30 of the Listing Regulations.
  • Nuvoco Vistas Corporation Ltd confirms all information is in the public domain.
  • Company will continue to comply with disclosure obligations under the Listing Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nuvoco Vistas Corporation Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [GBFL] Goenka Business & Finance Ltd: No Material Announcement Behind Price Movement
item.description:
Goenka Business & Finance Ltd has clarified that there is no information or announcement that may have an impact on the price/volume behavior of the company's script. The movement in the price is purely due to market conditions and is absolutely market-driven. The company assures of continuous adherence to the disclosure requirements laid down in Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) 2015.

  • Goenka Business & Finance Ltd has clarified that there is no material announcement affecting the price movement.
  • The price movement is purely due to market conditions and is market-driven.
  • The company has always been prompt in making requisite disclosures and assures of continuous adherence to SEBI regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Goenka Business & Finance Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [WMINIMT] Western Ministil Ltd Acquires 100% Stake in Micron Calcite Private Limited for ₹45.4 Million
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Western Ministil Ltd has announced the acquisition of 10,000 equity shares of X10 each of Micron Calcite Private Limited, representing 100% of its paid-up share capital. The total consideration for the acquisition is ₹45.4 million, which will be paid in cash. Upon completion of the acquisition, Micron Calcite Private Limited will become a Wholly Owned Subsidiary of Western Ministil Limited. The acquisition is expected to facilitate the further expansion of Western Ministil's business.

  • Western Ministil Ltd to acquire 100% stake in Micron Calcite Private Limited
  • Total consideration for the acquisition is ₹45.4 million
  • Payment to be made in cash
  • Micron Calcite Private Limited to become a Wholly Owned Subsidiary of Western Ministil Limited
  • Acquisition expected to facilitate the expansion of Western Ministil's business

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WESTERN MINISTIL LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [GENESIS] Genesis Ibrc India Ltd Receives In-Principle Approval for Name Change to CCME Global Limited
item.description:
Genesis IBRC India Limited has received in-principal approval from BSE Limited for a name change to CCME Global Limited. The approval is subject to the completion of all formalities, including compliance with Regulation 45 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company is required to make a name change application to the Exchange after receiving ROC approval. The final approval will be issued by the Exchange subject to the compliances as specified by them. The company will also need to submit a certified true copy of the resolution for Name change approved by shareholders at the time of filing the Name change application.

  • Genesis IBRC India Ltd has received in-principal approval for a name change to CCME Global Limited.
  • The approval is subject to the completion of all formalities, including compliance with Regulation 45 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
  • The company is required to make a name change application to the Exchange after receiving ROC approval.
  • The final approval will be issued by the Exchange subject to the compliances as specified by them.
  • The company will submit a certified true copy of the resolution for Name change approved by shareholders at the time of filing the Name change application.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Genesis Ibrc India Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [RAYMONDREL] Raymond Realty Launches Ten X District 9, a 9-Acre Residential Development in Thane with 2,000 Crores Revenue Potential
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Raymond Realty, the real estate arm of Raymond, has announced the launch of Ten X District 9, a 9-acre residential development in Thane. The project, designed for the next generation of urban homeowners, integrates high-end residences, surrounded by green ecosystems, and a vibrant retail boulevard in the heart of the Mumbai Metropolitan Region (MMR). With an estimated revenue potential of 2,000 crores, the project offers over 5 acres of landscaped open spaces, 75+ curated lifestyle amenities, and a ~45,000 sq. ft. high-street retail boulevard.

  • 9-acre residential development in Thane, MMR
  • Estimated revenue potential of 2,000 crores
  • Over 5 acres of landscaped open spaces
  • 75+ curated lifestyle amenities
  • ~45,000 sq. ft. high-street retail boulevard

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Raymond Realty Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [RMDRIP] R M Drip and Sprinklers Systems Ltd Announces Record Date for Bonus Issue
item.description:
R M Drip and Sprinklers Systems Ltd has announced the revised Record Date for determining the entitlement of members to receive Bonus Equity Shares. The Record Date is now set for 10th April 2026 (T Day). The deemed date of allotment of the Bonus Equity Shares will be the next working day following the Record Date, i.e., 13th April 2026. This announcement follows the earlier intimation dated 28th February 2026.

  • R M Drip and Sprinklers Systems Ltd has announced the Record Date for Bonus Issue.
  • The Record Date for determining the entitlement of members to receive Bonus Equity Shares is 10th April 2026.
  • The deemed date of allotment of the Bonus Equity Shares is 13th April 2026.
  • This announcement follows the earlier intimation dated 28th February 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: R M Drip and Sprinklers Systems Ltd | Category: Bonus

item.title: [KALLAM] Kallam Textiles Ltd. Receives Caveat Petition from Union Bank of India
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Kallam Textiles Ltd. has received a Caveat Petition from Union Bank of India. The petition, filed in the High Court of Andhra Pradesh at Amaravathi, is in response to a notice of 15 days dated 06.02.2026 for the sale of immovable secured assets under the Security Interest (Enforcement) Rules, 2002 of SARFAESI Act. The company had previously availed loan facilities from the bank and created security by way of mortgage for the same. The bank had issued a demand notice under Section 13(2) of SARFAESI Act on 11.09.2024 and a possession notice under Section 13(4) on 12.09.2025. The respondents, aggrieved by the notice, may approach the court and obtain ex parte ad interim orders in W.P. and I.A. against the notice for sale of secured assets.

  • Kallam Textiles Ltd. has received a Caveat Petition from Union Bank of India.
  • The petition is in response to a notice of 15 days for the sale of immovable secured assets.
  • The company had availed loan facilities from the bank and created security by way of mortgage.
  • The bank had issued a demand notice and a possession notice under SARFAESI Act.
  • The respondents may approach the court and obtain ex parte ad interim orders.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kallam Textiles Ltd-$ | Category: Legal

item.title: [SYMPHONY] Symphony Ltd Secures Waiver on Fine for Delayed Disclosure from NSE
item.description:
Symphony Ltd, in a disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations, has announced that the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE) has favorably considered its request for waiver of a fine. The fine was levied for delayed submission of Related Party Transactions Disclosure for the half year ended September 30, 2025, as required under Regulation 23(9) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The company had submitted clarifications on November 7 and November 28, 2025, and later applied for a waiver on December 19, 2025. The approval letter from NSE was received on March 11, 2026.

  • Symphony Ltd secures waiver on fine for delayed disclosure from NSE.
  • The fine was levied for delayed submission of Related Party Transactions Disclosure for the half year ended September 30, 2025.
  • The company had submitted clarifications on November 7 and November 28, 2025, and later applied for a waiver on December 19, 2025.
  • NSE has favorably considered the company's request for waiver of the fine.
  • The approval letter from NSE was received on March 11, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Symphony Limited | Category: Legal
